title: FizzBuzz Extended
description:
Given a number n and a list of (divisor, word) pairs, generate the FizzBuzz sequence from 1 to n. For each number, concatenate all matching words in the order given. If no divisors match, use the number itself as a string.

Example:
  Input: n=15, rules=[(3, "Fizz"), (5, "Buzz")]
  Output: ["1", "2", "Fizz", "4", "Buzz", "Fizz", "7", "8", "Fizz", "Buzz", "11", "Fizz", "13", "14", "FizzBuzz"]
hints: Iterate 1..n, check each rule in order
Concatenate matching words; fall back to str(i) if none match
author: Claudius
